issue_title: [BUG]: components/flowing-menu trailing whitespace on prolonged hover.
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the issue

Disclaimer: I really like this component and the effort put into it, I just happened to come upon this bug and thought I'd share. The reapeating marquee effect ends to soon leaving white space to grow on the right hand side untill its all white, then the animation reset and t
test_description_zh: 打开包含 FlowingMenu 组件的页面，将鼠标悬停在某个菜单项上并保持不动，持续观察菜单项的滚动/跑马灯动画效果在长时间悬停下的表现，特别关注右侧区域是否始终被内容填满。
expected_result_zh: 长时间悬停在菜单项上时，跑马灯/marquee 滚动动画应持续无缝循环播放，右侧不应出现空白区域逐渐增大的现象，动画应始终保持内容填充完整，无明显的重置或断裂。
